message:
fix(runtime): obligation channel capacity, replay duration, and derivation hash safety

obligation_channel:
- ObligationChannel::send now returns Result, rejecting sends when the
  live queue is at capacity (new ERR_OCH_QUEUE_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED error,
  FN-OB-013 event code)
- Add evict_oldest_terminal_obligation() to reclaim space from completed/
  cancelled obligations before rejecting new sends
- Update all call sites (lifecycle tests) to unwrap the new Result

time_travel_engine:
- Fix replay duration calculation: use max(timestamp) instead of sum of
  timestamps, which was producing nonsensically large durations when
  replaying multi-step sequences

supply_chain (certification + trust_card):
- Add refs.len() length prefix to derivation hash computation, preventing
  a zero-refs input from colliding with different-length ref lists that
  happen to produce the same concatenated evidence_id bytes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
